title: KONMAY 10pcs Big Velvet Drawstring Bags, Cream 17.0x23.0cm Velevet Jewellery Pouches for Gifts, Party Favors

Size: Approx. 15.0x20.0cm. Volume Size: Approx. 16.5x20.5cm. Please note that, the size may little different with the statement, since the bag is totally handmade and hand measured
Suitable for different occasions like wedding, shower, party, anniversary etc. You could also personalized the bag by print your logo, through the HTV,embroidery, screen print etc.
